title: OIG Cases (Department of Health and Human Services)

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: OIG Cases (Department of Health and Human Services)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide number of complaints filed and the status of investigation against NIH OFM Director.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

RG

title: Repeat Civil and EEO cases at Office of Managment under NIH OD

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Repeat Civil and EEO cases at Office of Managment under NIH OD
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please identify the number of Civil cases  and EEO cases filed and settled between 2019 and 2026. Provide the total amount paid to settle the cases. Identify the number of cases that are against same NIH staff member. Provide what actions have been taken by OM leadership to address the issues and decrease the cases.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

RG

communications.subject: Michigan Freedom of Information Act Request: Police reports at shelters
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All police incident reports, offense reports and arrest reports associated with the following addresses:
14750 St. Mary's St., Detroit, MI 48227
1995 Webb St., Detroit, MI 48206
16630 Wyoming Ave., Detroit, MI 48221
2959 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd., Detroit, MI 48208
12900 W Chicago, Detroit, MI 48227
15063 Gratiot Ave., Detroit, MI 48205
13220 Woodward Ave, Detroit, MI 48203
3535 3rd St., Detroit MI 48201
11850 Woodrow Wilson St, Detroit, MI 48206
3535 3rd Ave, Detroit, MI 48201
4626 Grand River Ave., Detroit, MI 48208
3426 Mack Ave., Detroit, MI 48201
3737 Humbolt St., Detroit, MI 48208
14320 Kercheval St., Detroit, MI 48214

Date range: Jan. 1, 2025 to April 8, 2026.

Include report narratives, offense codes and disposition where available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry

title: Unfair advantage in award competition at NIH

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Unfair advantage in award competition at NIH
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Require the Number of vendors participating in the competition for the award of contract : 47QTCA18D00J6/75N97025F00030.Conflict of interest verification as required by FAR Part 3 52.203-16,  FAR Part 9.5 , FAR 3.1103 and 3452.209-70. Provide the self attested certification and verification of the Conflict of Interest done by the Government for this contract to the email address racer006@gmail.com.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

RG
